飢餓の厄災を退けたその深夜――。<br>寝床につくが、なかなか眠れずに居た時、ノ:
It was late at night after we drove back the Calamity of Famine. I'd
gone to bed but was struggling to fall asleep when a knock came at the door.
こんばんはぁ～～。<br>退屈だったから、おにーさんをからかいにきたよぉ～♡: Good evening! I was bored, so I came to tease you, big bro!♡
今日は疲れてるんだ、また今度にしてくれ。: I'm tired today. Do it another time.
って、おにーさんってば疲れた顔しすぎ～。<br>しわっしわのおじいちゃんみたいじ:
Come on, you look way too tired, big bro. You're like a wrinkly old
man!♡
あれくらいで疲れるなんて……<br>ふふっ、やーい、ざーこ♡ みじんこ体力～～♡:
Getting tired from that much... Fufu, Nyaah, loser!♡ Such crumb-sized
stamina!♡
悪かったな……。こっちは早くそのみじんこ体力を<br>回復させたいんだ……いいか:
Sorry... I want to recover that crumb-sized stamina quickly... So just
let me sleep...
じゃあさ、ベリサちゃんが添い寝してあげよっか♡: Well then, how about Verisa cuddle you to sleep?♡
おにーさんのことだから、あたしみたいな可愛い子に添い寝して<br>もらったことな:
Knowing you, big bro, you've never been cuddled by a cute girl like
me, right? Fufu, it's sure to relax you, isn't it?
あっ――も、もしかして、緊張して眠れなさそうとか思ってるのぉ～？<br>それとも:
Ah—maybe you're worried you won't be able to sleep from
nervousness? Or are you thinking something pervy? That's sooo gross!♡
分かった分かった。<br>いいから、お前も早く帰って寝ろ。明日も早いぞー。:
Alright, alright. Just go back and get some sleep. Tomorrow's an
early start.
気づけば、ベリサに押し倒されていた。<br>乙女色に染まった彼女の顔がすぐ近くに:
Before I knew it, Verisa had pinned me down. Her face, flushed pink,
was right in front of me.
その……おにーさんを癒してあげたいっていうのは本当だもん……<br>指揮してると:
Um... It's true that I want to comfort you, big bro... Watching you
command made me see you in a new light...
それが本音であることは、<br>彼女の潤んだ瞳を見れば一目瞭然だった。: It was obvious from her teary eyes that she was being sincere.
ていうか、女の子にこんな迫られてるのに何もしないなんて、<br>おにーさん、朴念:
And besides, to have a girl all over you like this and do
nothing—you're way too dense, big bro... Nyah, you insensitive guy!♡ Dense, dense!♡
紅潮しながらも煽ってくるベリサを強引に引き寄せる。<br>そして、その桜色の唇に:
Flushed, Verisa kept provoking me. I yanked her close and pressed my
lips to hers.
ゆっくりと唇を離し、これでいいかと尋ねる。<br>すると彼女は揺れる瞳でこちらを:
Slowly, I pulled my lips away and asked if that was okay. She gazed at
me with trembling eyes and spoke.
まだ……足りない……<br>もっと……しよ……？: Still... not enough... Let's... keep going...?
